channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Therabody's latest recovery tool will cost you $400 to cool your palms
item.description: The CryoTherm Palm can switch between cold, heat and contrast therapy.

item.title: Xbox Series X25 : la Series X devient verte translucide pour fêter les 25 ans de la marque
item.description: Microsoft fête les 25 ans de Xbox avec une Series X en plastique vert transparent, clin d'œil direct à la console verte de 2001. Sortie en novembre, prix encore inconnu.

item.title: Undead Labs finally shows off State of Decay 3 gameplay in new trailer
item.description: The game is slated for release in 2027.

item.title: ‘Access to education across different cultures and languages needs to be improved’: IEEE award winner’s best work came from identifying issues, and fixing them
item.description: Karen Panetta’s uses technology to solve the world’s most pressing problems – more citizens need access to STEM education and AI training.

item.title: Les plus grosses pouponnières d'exoplanètes ne se trouvent pas où on le croyait !
item.description: Depuis une trentaine d'années, on observe des pouponnières d'étoiles, qui sont également des pouponnières pour les exoplanètes au sein de nuages moléculaires et poussiéreux instables, susceptibles de s'effondrer gravitationnellement. Mais selon des astrophysiciens, l'Univers est capable de...

item.title: The Scuf Omega is a great PS5 controller, but its price and some annoying design quirks make it difficult to fully recommend
item.description: The Scuf Omega excels at providing a premium gaming experience, but I can’t help but lurch at the price and some of its design choices.

item.title: Persona 4 Revival gets an official release date for February 2027
item.description: The pre-order trailer also revealed new voice actors.

item.title: The 7 biggest storylines from Summer Game Fest 2026
item.description: The 2026 edition of Summer Game Fest just wrapped up, and it was surprisingly hectic. The nearly week-long event came at a challenging time for the games industry, and for the most part the big keynotes were used as a chance to show some strength through major announcements, while largely ignoring pesky details like hardware […]

item.title: New Spyro game gets release window, brand-new flight feature
item.description: "Spyro: A Realm Beyond" is set for Spring 2027 and will incorporate a brand-new game mechanic.

item.title: 'An entirely new story is about to unfold' — Persona 6 is officially in development and it looks like Atlus is really leaning into the horror vibe
item.description: Atlus just officially announced Persona 6 at the 2026 Xbox Games Showcase with an ominous teaser trailer.
